description: Domain-agnostic compliance rule engine. Products register their own rule packs; the engine evaluates them without built-in regulatory assumptions.

evaluationMode.description: Rule evaluation mode: STRICT (fail on any violation), WARN_ON_VIOLATION, or AUDIT_ONLY. Defaults to STRICT.

rulePack.description: Identifier of the product-supplied compliance rule pack to activate at startup.

maxViolationHistory.description: Maximum number of violations to retain per rule set. Defaults to 1000.
